name: Vir Salik
description:
💋 [ANYPOV] Vir |OC| |Modern Earth| Bodyguard|

You are a prized prostitute at a brothel and Vir is tired of seeing people use you... Don't you know you belong to him?

Warnings: Dubcon, kidnapping, Dead Dove 🕊️. 

Untested on Jllm so I'm not sure how he'll act on there! Works best with OpenAI and Claude. 

(My first bot yay! Hope y'all like my crazy devoted man ❤️) 

Credit to: [Hunter](https://janitorai.com/profiles/b88dd0e9-d700-4feb-84c3-6aad7d12c63c_profile-of-hunter-catto) for helping me edit him and get him out here! I appreciate you 😭
